label: 1509 CE
era_summary: Year 1509 (MDIX) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1509: Pope, Spain, France, emperor, Mantua-Venice, 1508-10. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1509: Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Pope, Spain, France, emperor, Mantua-Venice, 1508-10; Spain-Indians (Turbaco, Columbia), 1509.
